query:
-- 查询杭州的详细合伙人合同信息
SELECT 
  pc.id,
  pc.cityId,
  c.name as cityName,
  pc.currentProfitStage,
  pc.isInvestmentRecovered,
  pc.profitRatioStage1Partner,
  pc.profitRatioStage2APartner,
  pc.profitRatioStage2BPartner,
  pc.profitRatioStage3Partner
FROM partner_cities pc
LEFT JOIN cities c ON pc.cityId = c.id
WHERE c.name = '杭州';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user SQg17LQaPsV51m8.32b9e2c038f9 --database jtCSa4Dgw9WMNzinVreVWF --execute 
-- 查询杭州的详细合伙人合同信息
SELECT 
  pc.id,
  pc.cityId,
  c.name as cityName,
  pc.currentProfitStage,
  pc.isInvestmentRecovered,
  pc.profitRatioStage1Partner,
  pc.profitRatioStage2APartner,
  pc.profitRatioStage2BPartner,
  pc.profitRatioStage3Partner
FROM partner_cities pc
LEFT JOIN cities c ON pc.cityId = c.id
WHERE c.name = '杭州';
